title: Automation by text column value
excerpt:
Just making sure I can’t automate recipes based on text column value? 
Does someone know if this is on Monday.com roadmap? 
A simple If → This → Than → That feature would make Monday automations x10 better. 
Cheers.

posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just making sure I can’t automate recipes based on text column value?
